main.description: A blind-signed rep token — Chaumian ecash for reputation. Each token is a specific denomination (1, 5, 10, 25 rep) signed by the board's mint key for that denomination. Fungible, stakeable, unlinkable to the job that earned it.

signature.description: RSA-PSS blind signature (base64url). Verifiable against the board's published mint key for this denomination.

nullifier.description: SHA-256 derived deterministically from the token. Prevents double-spend.

denomination.description: Rep value of this token: 1, 5, 10, or 25.

boardId.description: Hostname of the bounty board that minted this token.

spent.description: Whether this token has been spent (staked or transferred).
